creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
See review D19100 for the patch.

https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/mesa/mesa/commit/731c4adcf9b1 fixed ANV (Intel Vulkan), obsoleting attachment 187401.
https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/mesa/mesa/commit/3fbdcd942fe2 bumped minimum LLVM to 7.0.
https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/mesa/mesa/commit/e68777c87cee explicitly declared autotools as unmaintained.
